title: Verify maintain the spend-category catalogue contract
preconditions: A fresh Ledger plus root, child, duplicate-sibling, legal reparent, self-parent, descendant-cycle, archived-parent, active-child archive, and reactivation cases.
steps: Invoke category create/get/list/rename/reparent/archive/reactivate through the public contract; inspect stable IDs, ancestry, append-only parent/lifecycle history, deterministic ordering, and stable no-mutation errors.
expected: The hierarchy remains acyclic with one current parent or root per category; active sibling names are unique; moves retain identity/history; active children block parent archival; lists expose deterministic ancestry; replays create no duplicate events.
